final:
module RefModule (
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    input wire we,
    input wire clk,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
  wire [3:0] _tap_data_in = data_in & {4{1'b1}};

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            data_out <= data_in; // Write data to the cell
        end
        // If we is low, do nothing (hold the previous value)
    end
endmodule
